note: All figures correspond to [modeled ILO estimates](#dod:ilo-modelled-estimates). Employment is defined in line with the [13th ICLS](#dod:13-icls) and includes the production of goods for own use, such as subsistence farming.
title: Population by labor force status
subtitle: Share of the total population in each category, based on [ILO](#dod:ilo) definitions: employed work for pay or profit, unemployed are without work, but actively looking for a job and available to start soon, outside the labor force are not working and not seeking work, and below working age are younger than 15 years old.
